assert_SimTracesFile.description: Test assertion for SimTracesFile from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_TypeInvariant.condition:
and loop_result        in {"NONE", "PASS", "FAIL"}
    and tla_file_available in BOOLEAN
    and current_state      in States
    and simulate_called    in BOOLEAN
    and simulate_timeout   in 0..SIM_TIMEOUT_LIMIT
    and traces_written     in BOOLEAN
assert_TypeInvariant.description: Test assertion for TypeInvariant from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_ValidState.description: Test assertion for ValidState from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_BoundedExecution.description: Test assertion for BoundedExecution from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_SimTimeoutBounded.message: Assertion failed: SimTimeoutBounded — simulate_called => simulate_timeout <= SIM_TIMEOUT_LIMIT
assert_SimTimeoutBounded.description: Test assertion for SimTimeoutBounded from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_SimCalledOnlyAfterPass.description: Test assertion for SimCalledOnlyAfterPass from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_TlaFilePresentWhenSimCalled.description: Test assertion for TlaFilePresentWhenSimCalled from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_TracesWrittenImpliesSimCalled.description: Test assertion for TracesWrittenImpliesSimCalled from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_TracesFileCorrect.message: Assertion failed: TracesFileCorrect — traces_written => traces_file = SimTracesFile
assert_TracesFileCorrect.description: Test assertion for TracesFileCorrect from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_UploadBatchContainsTraces.condition:
current_state in {"UploadBatched", "ContainerExit"} implies
        traces_file in upload_batch
assert_UploadBatchContainsTraces.message:
Assertion failed: UploadBatchContainsTraces — current_state \in {"UploadBatched", "ContainerExit"} =>
        traces_file \in upload_batch
assert_UploadBatchContainsTraces.description: Test assertion for UploadBatchContainsTraces from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_ContainerExitSafety.condition:
current_state = "ContainerExit" implies
        and simulate_called
        and simulate_timeout <= SIM_TIMEOUT_LIMIT
        and traces_written
        and traces_file = SimTracesFile
        and traces_file in upload_batch
assert_ContainerExitSafety.message:
Assertion failed: ContainerExitSafety — current_state = "ContainerExit" =>
        /\ simulate_called
        /\ simulate_timeout <= SIM_TIMEOUT_LIMIT
      ...
assert_ContainerExitSafety.description: Test assertion for ContainerExitSafety from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_NonPassSkipsSimulation.description: Test assertion for NonPassSkipsSimulation from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec

assert_OrderingGuarantee.condition:
traces_file in upload_batch implies
        and traces_written
        and simulate_called
assert_OrderingGuarantee.message:
Assertion failed: OrderingGuarantee — traces_file \in upload_batch =>
        /\ traces_written
        /\ simulate_called
assert_OrderingGuarantee.description: Test assertion for OrderingGuarantee from gwt_0011_SimTraceUpload spec
